'''yanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bygly|bygly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-n-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bygly|bygly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yanate|yanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yanatesher|yanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yanatesherĂ«m|yanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yanatero|yanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yanateshĂ«|yanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yanateshĂ«m|yanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyanatero|gokiyanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyanateshĂ«|gokiyanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyanateshĂ«m|gokiyanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyanankerom|goyanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyanankeshĂ«|goyanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyanankeshĂ«m|goyanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyanankeya|goyanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yanaterom|yanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yanatemu|yanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yanateya|yanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyanaterom|gokiyanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyanatemu|gokiyanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyanateya|gokiyanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yananate|yananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yananatesher|yananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yananatesherĂ«m|yananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yananatero|yananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yananateshĂ«|yananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yananateshĂ«m|yananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyananatero|gokiyananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyananateshĂ«|gokiyananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyananateshĂ«m|gokiyananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyananankerom|goyananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyananankeshĂ«|goyananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyananankeshĂ«m|goyananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyananankeya|goyananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yananaterom|yananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yananatemu|yananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yananateya|yananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyananaterom|gokiyananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyananatemu|gokiyananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyananateya|gokiyananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠnĂŠte|yĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠnĂŠtesher|yĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠnĂŠtero|yĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠnĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠnĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠnĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠnĂŠterom|yĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠnĂŠtemu|yĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠnĂŠteya|yĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠnĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠnĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafnafte|yafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafnaftesher|yafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafnaftesherĂ«m|yafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafnaftero|yafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafnafteshĂ«|yafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafnafteshĂ«m|yafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafnaftero|gokiyafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafnafteshĂ«|gokiyafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafnafteshĂ«m|gokiyafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafnafnkerom|goyafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafnafnkeshĂ«|goyafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafnafnkeshĂ«m|goyafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafnafnkeya|goyafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafnafterom|yafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafnaftemu|yafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafnafteya|yafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafnafterom|gokiyafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafnaftemu|gokiyafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafnafteya|gokiyafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
